大家好，欢迎回到TechCrunch专注于风险投资的播客The Equity，在这里我们解开标题背后的数字。
这是“股票星期一”，这是我们一周开始的入门读物，我们在这里回顾最新消息，挖掘未来一周，谈论一些巧妙的融资，并深入了解创业界的最新重大新闻。(如果你愿意，你可以在Twitter上关注这个节目，我也可以在这里关注！别忘了看看上周五的那一集。所有酷孩子都在这么做。)。
多棒的周末啊！在经历了一段平静的、有点乏味的休息期后，这个周末给我们带来了一些曲折，非常有趣。大多数人都处理了优步-Postmate可能的合作，所以我们写了这个节目来讨论这笔交易的未经证实的性质。
然后，它被确认了。因此，这里是今天的“股票星期一”的第二版，由于这笔交易的官方性质，我们对其进行了重塑：
优步将以26.5亿美元全股票交易收购Postmate。今天上午，优步的股价在开盘前上涨，在交易得到确认后，谣言之翼的打击更加猛烈。目前，优步的投资者似乎很高兴，在失去GrubHub之后，他们的公司设法收购了一家规模较小的公司。这样做可能会让优步对餐厅和司机有更大的影响力，并提振优步2020年下半年的收入数字，这些数字仍将受到新冠肺炎及其由此带来的经济影响的影响。
对于科技和其他风投支持的公司来说，第三季度的收益暂时不会开始，而进入本周，公开市场正在上涨。尽管有这么多坏消息。坏消息(短期的、经济的)和股市收益之间的负关联正慢慢地从笑话变成肮脏的现实。
本周，我们将密切关注美国和中国的经济数据、香港和中印边境的地缘政治局势，以及即将出炉的第二季度风险投资数据。
今天上午，我们还深入研究了三轮融资，其中Scalefast筹集了2200万美元，Digitifi筹集了1400万美元，AirVet也筹集了1400万美元。我们保证，还会有更多的国际回合。
我们今天上午结束了讨论，想知道Postmate能否为优步(Uber)提供一个叙事提振，这家公司第二季度的业绩不会是它历史上最好的。随着Postmate夹在腋下进入财报电话会议，优步可以加倍利用Uber Eats的叙事，在房间里炫耀Postmate，并承诺乘车数据也会变得更好。
股市每周一上午7：00 PT和周五上午6：00 PT下跌，所以请订阅我们的苹果播客、阴天、Spotify和所有演员。
note_en:
Hello and welcome back to  Equity, TechCrunch’s venture capital-focused podcast where we unpack the numbers behind the headlines.
 This is Equity Monday, our week-starting primer in which we go over the latest news, dig into the week ahead, talk about some neat funding rounds, and dive into the latest big news from the startup world. (You can follow the show on Twitter  here, and myself  here, if you are so inclined! Don’t forget to check out  last Friday’s episode as well. All the cool kids are doing it.)
 What a weekend! After some quiet, somewhat dull off-week periods, this weekend brought us twists and turns that were good fun. Most dealt with a possible  Uber  -Postmates tie up, so we wrote the show to talk about the transaction’s unconfirmed nature.
 Then, it got confirmed. So, here’s the  second edition of today’s Equity Monday, recast due to the deal’s official nature:
 Uber will buy Postmates for $2.65 billion in an all-stock transaction. Uber shares were up this morning ahead of the open on the wings of the rumor — wings that beat even harder after the deal was confirmed. Uber investors seem pleased, for now, that after losing out on GrubHub their company has managed to buy a smaller player. Doing so may give Uber more leverage over restaurants and drivers, and boost Uber’s H2 2020 revenue numbers that will still be impacted by COVID-19 and its resulting economic impacts.
 Q3 earnings don’t kick off for tech and other VC-backed companies for a bit, and heading into the week the public markets are up. Despite all the bad news. The inverse correlation between bad news (short-term, economic), and stock market gains is slowly moving from joke to sordid reality.
 This week we’re keeping tabs on US and Chinese economic data, the geopolitical situation in Hong Kong and the India-China border, and Q2 VC data as it comes out.
 We also dug into three funding rounds this morning, detailing  Scalefast raising  $22 million,  DigniFi raising  $14 million, and  AirVet raising  $14 million as well. More international rounds to come, we promise.
 We wrapped this morning wondering if Postmates can provide a narrative boost to Uber, a company that isn’t going to have the best Q2 numbers in its history. With Postmates tucked under its arm going into the earnings call, Uber can double-down on its Uber Eats narrative, flash Postmates around the room, and promise that Rides data will get better as well.
  Equity drops every Monday at 7:00 AM PT and Friday at 6:00 am PT, so subscribe to us on   Apple Podcasts ,   Overcast ,   Spotify  and all the casts.
title: 股票周一：优步-Postmate宣布，三轮融资，叙事性建设

note: 如今，压缩视频数据占全球互联网流量的80%。H.266/VVC代表了(至少)四代视频编码国际标准的顶峰。之前的标准H.264/高级视频编码(AVC)和H.265/HEVC是由Fraunhofer HHI做出的重大贡献，它们在超过100亿个终端设备中仍然有效，处理全球视频比特量的90%以上。这两个先前的标准也被三个艾美奖共同认可，因为它们对电视技术的进步做出了重大贡献。通过降低数据需求，H.266/VVC使移动网络(数据容量有限)中的视频传输更加高效。例如，先前的标准H.265/HEVC需要大约10千兆字节的数据来传输90分钟的超高清视频。有了这项新技术，只需要5千兆字节的数据就能达到同样的质量。由于H.266/VVC的开发考虑到了超高分辨率的视频内容，因此当在平板电视上流式传输4K或8K视频时，新标准尤其有利。此外，H.266/VVC非常适合所有类型的运动图像：从高分辨率360°视频全景到屏幕共享内容。Fraunhofer HHI视频编码系统部门负责人、H.266/VVC+500页标准规范编辑本杰明·布罗斯说：“经过近三年的努力，我们为在H.266/VVC的开发过程中发挥了重要作用而感到自豪，他是Fraunhofer HHI公司视频编码系统部门的负责人，也是H.266/VVC+500页标准规范的编辑。由于H.266/VVC在编码效率方面的巨大飞跃，视频的使用将在全球范围内进一步增加。此外，H.266/VVC增加的多功能性使其在与视频传输和存储相关的更广泛的应用中更具吸引力。“如果您考虑到Fraunhofer HHI已经在以前的视频编码标准H.264/AVC和H.265/HEVC的开发中发挥了关键作用，那么我们很高兴看到互联网上超过50%的比特是由Fraunhofer HHI技术产生的，”视频编码和存储部门负责人Detlev Marpe博士补充道，“如果您考虑到Fraunhofer HHI已经在之前的视频编码标准H.264/AVC和H.265/HEVC的开发中发挥了关键作用，那么我们对互联网上超过50%的比特是由Fraunhofer HHI技术产生的这一事实感到高兴。”计划建立基于FRAND原则(即公平、合理和非歧视性)的统一和透明的许可模式，以使用与H.266/VVC相关的标准基本专利。为此，媒体编码产业论坛(MC-IF)应运而生。除了弗劳恩霍夫协会，MC-IF现在还包括30多家公司和组织。目前正在设计使用H.266/VVC所需的新芯片，例如用于移动设备的芯片。Fraunhofer HHI视频编码和分析部主管Thomas Schierl博士宣布：“今年秋天，Fraunhofer HHI将发布第一款支持H.266/VVC的软件(用于编码器和解码器)。”
note_en: Today, compressed video data make up 80% of global Internet traffic. H.266/VVC represents the pinnacle of (at least) four generations of international standards for video coding. The previous standards H.264/Advanced Video Coding (AVC) and H.265/HEVC, which were produced with substantial contributions from Fraunhofer HHI, remain active in more than 10 billion end devices, processing over 90% of the total global volume of video bits. Both previous standards were also recognized by collectively three Emmy Engineering Awards for contributing substantially to the progress of television technology.  Through a reduction of data requirements, H.266/VVC makes video transmission in mobile networks (where data capacity is limited) more efficient. For instance, the previous standard H.265/HEVC requires ca. 10 gigabytes of data to transmit a 90-min UHD video. With this new technology, only 5 gigabytes of data are required to achieve the same quality. Because H.266/VVC was developed with ultra-high-resolution video content in mind, the new standard is particularly beneficial when streaming 4K or 8K videos on a flat screen TV. Furthermore, H.266/VVC is ideal for all types of moving images: from high-resolution 360° video panoramas to screen sharing contents.  “After dedicating almost three years toward this standard, we are proud to have been instrumental in developing H.266/VVC," says Benjamin Bross, head of the Video Coding Systems group at Fraunhofer HHI and editor of the +500-page standard specification of H.266/VVC. “Because of the quantum leap in coding efficiency offered by H.266/VVC, the use of video will increase further worldwide. Moreover, the increased versatility of H.266/VVC makes its use more attractive for a broader range of applications related to the transmission and storage of video.”  "If you consider that Fraunhofer HHI already played a key role in the development of the previous video coding standards H.264/AVC and H.265/HEVC, then we are happy with the fact that more than 50% of the bits on the Internet are generated by a Fraunhofer HHI technology,” adds Dr. Detlev Marpe, head of the Video Coding and Analytics department at Fraunhofer HHI.  A uniform and transparent licensing model based on the FRAND principle (i.e., fair, reasonable, and non-discriminatory) is planned to be established for the use of standard essential patents related to H.266/VVC. For this purpose, the Media Coding Industry Forum (MC-IF) was founded. In addition to Fraunhofer Society, the MC-IF now includes +30 companies and organizations. The new chips required for the use of H.266/VVC, such as those in mobile devices, are currently being designed. Dr. Thomas Schierl, head of the Video Coding and Analytics department at Fraunhofer HHI, announced “this autumn Fraunhofer HHI will publish the first software (for both encoder and decoder) to support H.266/VVC.”
title: H.266/VVC标准定稿，尺寸比H.265小约50%
title_en: H.266/VVC Standard Finalized with ~50% Lower Size Compared to H.265
